issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Effect trashes from Life cards, not hand. Should use custom action or clarify target as Life pile.
Missing conditional logic. Action should only occur if player chooses to trash (optional 'may'). Current DSL shows unconditional trash.
FlipLife is incorrect. Effect adds card from deck to top of Life cards (not flips Life total). Should be custom action or SearchDeck with Life destination.
Second trigger with PlaySelf is unexplained and contradicts card text. No self-play mechanic exists in original effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards: Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.
